name: ARVIS Punch 2
developer: Mindfly Studio, Johan Loredo, Carlos Marañon
short_description: Train in our virtual gym to become the best fighter. Defeat every one of our fighters, and get ready to face other players!
detailed_description:
You already know the drill, so let's get fighting!

Our star fighters are back, and though they might look similar, they are far from the same! They've come back faster, smarter, and meaner.

Except for Fito, he's just there to have a good time.

Once again, you will begin  your session in our virtual gym, but this time you'll be able to choose where to fight, no matter if it is our original ARVIS Arena, or the home of our most scary fighter, Ultratumba: Mictlan.

If that is not enough, you will be able to access our brand new multiplayer mode! Where you'll be paired with another player to fight for the glory.

So get into ARVIS Punch 2, choose your fighter -or choose to fight another player- , get ready, use your own fists to punch, and try to make it to the next round!

Don't forget to warm up with our equipment in the lobby!
